identity.name: NDR — SMB/RPC Lateral Sweep EAL Validation
identity.summary: Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-NDR-004. Plane: NDR. Primary technique: T1046. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.
identity.description:
Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-NDR-004. Plane: NDR. Primary technique: T1046. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.

Source scenario: SIM-NDR-004.
UC: Lateral Reconnaissance Detection via NGFW EAL / TC: Host Sweeping Across SMB/RPC Ports.

prerequisites.description: Lab environment matching scenario SIM-NDR-004 requirements.

payload.code:
# step-1: Dry-run: verify CIDR coverage and authorisation
cat > /tmp/smb-sweep-dry.yml <<'YML'
campaign_id: CMP-NDR-004
name: "NDR validation — SMB sweep dry"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - 10.50.10.0/24
dry_run: true
tags: [ndr, lateral, eal]
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: smb_rpc_sweep
    params:
      target_cidr: "10.50.10.0/24"
      ports: [445, 139, 135]
      connect_timeout: 1.0
      inter_host_delay: 0.05
      max_hosts: 64
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/smb-sweep-dry.yml
# step-2: Live SMB/RPC sweep against ITDR lab subnet
cat > /tmp/smb-sweep-live.yml <<'YML'
campaign_id: CMP-NDR-004
name: "NDR validation — SMB sweep live"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - 10.50.10.0/24
dry_run: false
tags: [ndr, lateral, eal]
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: smb_rpc_sweep
    params:
      target_cidr: "10.50.10.0/28"
      ports: [445, 139, 135]
      connect_timeout: 1.0
      inter_host_delay: 0.1
      max_hosts: 16
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/smb-sweep-live.yml --live
